summary: 6 unread emails today, mostly community notifications from The Agentic Lab and AI newsletters. One item needs your attention: a Texas vehicle registration notice from January says your 2014 Mazda registration expired in December 2025 — that's likely 3 months overdue and worth handling today. No emails require a direct reply.

items.subject: It's time to renew your registration
items.snippet: Your 2014 Mazda (VIN ending 1256) registration expired end of December 2025 — renewal notice sent January 4th.
